meta.title: Secure payment — BuildTrack
topbar.label: SECURE PAYMENT
opening.title: Opening your secure payment…
opening.body: Paddle, our payment processor, is about to open its payment window. Your card details go there — they never pass through BuildTrack.
missing.title: This payment link is incomplete
missing.body: The link you opened is missing its payment reference. That usually happens when it gets cut while copying — ask your BuildTrack contact to resend it.
closed.title: Your payment is still pending
closed.body: You closed the window before finishing the payment. Nothing was charged — you can pick it up again whenever you like.
completed.title: Payment received!
completed.body: Your workspace activates automatically within a few minutes. We also sent you an email with a link to set your password — that's all you need to get in.
completed.note: You can close this tab now. If you can't get in after a few minutes, let us know.
error.title: We couldn't open the payment
error.body: This link may have expired, or it may have been replaced by a newer one. Try again — and if it keeps failing, ask your BuildTrack contact to issue you a fresh link.
contact.lead: Need help? Write to us at
secure.note: Payments are processed by Paddle, our billing provider. Your card details never touch BuildTrack's servers.
